channel.title: Security on The Hidden Port
channel.description: Recent content in Security on The Hidden Port

item.title: AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore: Full Policy Breakdown
item.description: What AmazonSSMManagedInstanceCore actually permits, when to use it for Session Manager, and how to build a scoped-down custom policy for production.

item.title: AWS Incident Response: 5 Scenarios & How to Contain Them
item.description: Handle real AWS security incidents step by step. Covers compromised keys, public S3 buckets, cryptomining, privilege escalation, and automated containment.

item.title: EKS Security Best Practices: Hardening Your Cluster
item.description: Harden Amazon EKS with RBAC, network policies, pod security standards, image scanning, secrets encryption, and node lockdown. Practical guide with YAML examples.

item.title: EKS Security: Monitoring, Audit Logs & Runtime Detection
item.description: Secure Amazon EKS clusters with CloudWatch, GuardDuty, audit logs, and Falco runtime detection. Includes architecture examples and common pitfalls.

item.title: IDOR Vulnerabilities in AWS APIs: How to Find & Prevent Them
item.description: What IDOR is, why it's dangerous in AWS APIs and Lambda functions, and how to detect and prevent insecure direct object references. Includes real bug bounty examples.

item.title: Amazon GuardDuty Setup: Findings, Alerts & SIEM Integration
item.description: Enable GuardDuty, understand finding types, set up alerting, and integrate with your SIEM. Step-by-step guide with Terraform and console walkthroughs.

item.title: Detect AWS IAM Privilege Escalation with CloudTrail
item.description: How to detect IAM privilege escalation in AWS using CloudTrail events, EventBridge rules, and real-world API patterns. Includes alerting setup and Terraform.

item.title: Hardened Amazon Linux 2 AMI with EC2 Image Builder
item.description: Build a CIS-compliant Amazon Linux 2 AMI using EC2 Image Builder. Covers IMDSv2 enforcement, auditd, CloudWatch logging, and automated security hardening.

item.title: IAM Least Privilege in AWS: Access Analyzer Guide
item.description: Audit and tighten IAM permissions using Access Analyzer, CloudTrail, and service last-accessed data. Step-by-step workflows for enforcing least privilege.

item.title: Replace SSH with Session Manager: Secure EC2 Access Guide
item.description: Stop using SSH keys and bastion hosts. Set up AWS Systems Manager Session Manager for secure, auditable EC2 access with no inbound ports.

item.title: EC2 Hardening Guide: Secure AWS Instances Step by Step
item.description: Harden EC2 instances with IAM least privilege, OS lockdown, encryption, logging, and CIS benchmark checks. Practical guide with console and Terraform examples.

item.title: AWS Incident Response Toolkit: Resources & Templates
item.description: Complete AWS incident response toolkit. Includes playbooks, templates, tools, and guidance for cloud security teams.

item.title: Building Least-Privilege IAM Roles with IAM Access Analyzer
item.description: Learn how to use IAM Access Analyzer to identify risky permissions, generate fine-tuned IAM policies, and integrate the tool into your AWS development workflow.

item.title: How to Detect AWS Root Account Usage (And Respond to It)
item.description: This guide walks you through detecting and responding to AWS root account usage using CloudTrail, EventBridge, SNS, and optionally Lambda or Slack. Includes Terraform examples and AWS Console workflows.
